meta.name: UWES-9 Utrecht Work Engagement Scale
meta.description: The UWES-9 is a 9-item scale measuring three dimensions of work engagement: vigor, dedication, and absorption.
meta.author: Schaufeli WB, Bakker AB (2003)
meta.reference: Schaufeli WB, Bakker AB, Salanova M. The measurement of work engagement with a short questionnaire. Educ Psychol Meas. 2006;66(4):701-716.
meta.instruction: The following statements are about how you feel at work. Please read each statement carefully and decide if you ever feel this way about your job.

commonChoices.label: Almost never (a few times a year or less)
Very often (a few times a week)

questions.text: At my work, I feel bursting with energy.
I find the work that I do full of meaning and purpose.
Time flies when I am working.
At my job, I feel strong and vigorous.
I am enthusiastic about my job.
When I am working, I forget everything else around me.
When I get up in the morning, I feel like going to work.
I feel happy when I am working intensely.

ranges.label: Low Work Engagement
ranges.description: Your work engagement level is low. You may lack enthusiasm and motivation at work. This indicates that your overall mental health is in good condition, with all areas of functioning working well.
suggestions: Reflect on whether your work aligns with your personal values
Discuss work content adjustments with your supervisor
Identify aspects of your work that bring a sense of achievement
Continue maintaining a healthy lifestyle and mental well-being
Focus on personal growth and positive experiences

ranges.label: Moderate Work Engagement
ranges.description: Your work engagement is at a moderate level. At this level, psychological concerns may be affecting your daily life. It is recommended to take active steps and consider available support options.
suggestions: Try setting challenging goals at work
Develop social relationships in the workplace
Seek more autonomy and growth opportunities
Consider consulting a mental health professional
Identify your specific sources of concern

ranges.label: High Work Engagement
ranges.description: Your work engagement is high. You are full of vigor, dedication, and absorption in your work. Your mental health concerns are notable and may be impacting daily functioning. Speaking with a mental health professional is recommended.
suggestions: Continue maintaining high work engagement
Be mindful of work-life balance to prevent burnout
Help colleagues enhance their work engagement
Schedule a mental health professional assessment as soon as possible
Make sure you have trusted people around you for support

vigor.label: Low Vigor
vigor.description: You lack energy and vitality at work, possibly feeling exhausted and unmotivated. This indicates that your overall mental health is in good condition, with all areas of functioning working well.
suggestions: Continue maintaining a healthy lifestyle and mental well-being
Focus on personal growth and positive experiences
Maintain regular exercise and social activities
Remember to seek support when facing difficulties

vigor.label: Moderate Vigor
vigor.description: You have some energy at work, though it may fluctuate. At this level, psychological concerns may be affecting your daily life. It is recommended to take active steps and consider available support options.
suggestions: Consider consulting a mental health professional
Identify your specific sources of concern
Maintain a structured daily routine
Try relaxation and coping methods that suit you
Engage in meaningful activities and social interactions

vigor.label: High Vigor
vigor.description: You are full of energy, vitality, and resilience at work. Your mental health concerns are notable and may be impacting daily functioning. Speaking with a mental health professional is recommended.
suggestions: Schedule a mental health professional assessment as soon as possible
Make sure you have trusted people around you for support
Follow the treatment plan recommended by your professional
Maintain basic daily self-care routines
If you feel overwhelmed, call a mental health helpline for immediate support

dedication.label: Low Dedication
dedication.description: You lack enthusiasm and identification with your work, possibly feeling it is meaningless. This indicates that your overall mental health is in good condition, with all areas of functioning working well.
suggestions: Continue maintaining a healthy lifestyle and mental well-being
Focus on personal growth and positive experiences
Maintain regular exercise and social activities
Remember to seek support when facing difficulties

dedication.label: Moderate Dedication
dedication.description: You have some enthusiasm and commitment to your work, with room for growth. At this level, psychological concerns may be affecting your daily life. It is recommended to take active steps and consider available support options.
suggestions: Consider consulting a mental health professional
Identify your specific sources of concern
Maintain a structured daily routine
Try relaxation and coping methods that suit you
Engage in meaningful activities and social interactions

dedication.label: High Dedication
dedication.description: You are passionate and proud of your work, finding it highly meaningful. Your mental health concerns are notable and may be impacting daily functioning. Speaking with a mental health professional is recommended.
suggestions: Schedule a mental health professional assessment as soon as possible
Make sure you have trusted people around you for support
Follow the treatment plan recommended by your professional
Maintain basic daily self-care routines
If you feel overwhelmed, call a mental health helpline for immediate support

absorption.label: Low Absorption
absorption.description: You find it difficult to concentrate at work and are easily distracted. This indicates that your overall mental health is in good condition, with all areas of functioning working well.
suggestions: Continue maintaining a healthy lifestyle and mental well-being
Focus on personal growth and positive experiences
Maintain regular exercise and social activities
Remember to seek support when facing difficulties

absorption.label: Moderate Absorption
absorption.description: You can maintain some focus at work, though occasional distractions occur. At this level, psychological concerns may be affecting your daily life. It is recommended to take active steps and consider available support options.
suggestions: Consider consulting a mental health professional
Identify your specific sources of concern
Maintain a structured daily routine
Try relaxation and coping methods that suit you
Engage in meaningful activities and social interactions

absorption.label: High Absorption
absorption.description: You are highly focused and immersed in your work, fully engaged. Your mental health concerns are notable and may be impacting daily functioning. Speaking with a mental health professional is recommended.
suggestions: Schedule a mental health professional assessment as soon as possible
Make sure you have trusted people around you for support
Follow the treatment plan recommended by your professional
Maintain basic daily self-care routines
If you feel overwhelmed, call a mental health helpline for immediate support
